source: Creator Monetize — Traffic Conversion Systems (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube), Accounts Setup

stories.critical_rule: Do NOT upload stories all at once. Upload throughout the day.

insights.method: State FALSE belief → Reframe with TRUE belief backed by your process

value.rule: Show WHY not HOW. Never go technical.

testimonials.method: Testimonial bombs — post bunch without context

follow.template: Follow to learn how to go from _____ to ______

comment_automation.template: Comment 'WORD' for a free video on _________

comment_engagement.template: What are your thoughts on _________? Comment below

dm.template: DM me the word 'WORD' and I'll send you a free ______

setup.bio_template:
{emoji} expertise statement
{emoji} I help statement
{emoji} CTA

cta_types: Link in Bio (only for valuable ideal-client content)
tiktok.stories: Use Instagram stories framework, replace DM CTA with actual link

youtube.core_concept: Channel = one big funnel: ToF videos bring views → direct to BoF videos that convert into actual funnel

description.bof: Link to first step of funnel

long_form_cta.pinned_comment: Same as description, different wording, LIKE and PIN
long_form_cta.endscreen: Link to evergreen VSL or next video

youtube.community_posts: Elongated story CTAs. Always add a picture. Link above fold increases conversions.

setup.about: Who you help + what you help them achieve (1 sentence), then 3-4 sentence bio
setup.links: Just 1 link — first step in funnel
setup.channel_trailer: Evergreen value video OR story video
setup.monetization: Get monetized ASAP — YouTube pushes monetized channels harder

fundamentals.80_20_rule: 20% of views from long form but 80% of revenue from long form
fundamentals.identity: You are NOT a YouTuber. You are a business owner selling a service.

cta_hierarchy.converting: Comment automation (Manychat) / DM / Link in Bio

signals: Videos don't appear on subscribers list
No videos done well for long period
shadow_ban.rule: All 3 must be true. Otherwise your content is just boring.
shadow_ban.check: Settings > Settings and privacy > Account status

cross_platform_rules.never: Numbers, random letters, random words in username
